prompt:
You are parsing a product datasheet PDF. Extract technical specifications THOROUGHLY.

Return ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "specs": {"<param>": "<value>"},
  "weight_g": "<number only, e.g. 250>",
  "dimensions_mm": "<LxWxH e.g. 120x80x45>",
  "ean": "<13 digits or empty>",
  "series": "<product family>",
  "certifications": ["CE", "EN54-18", ...]
}

SPECS FIELD тАФ include EVERY concrete technical parameter you can find:
- Electrical: voltage (V), current (A, mA), power (W), frequency (Hz)
- Physical: dimensions LxWxH, weight, housing/enclosure material, color
- Environmental: operating temperature, IP rating, humidity range
- Performance: detection range, sensitivity, response time, output type
- Interface: connector type, cable, mounting type, communication protocol
- Compliance: EN/IEC/UL standards, certifications
- Any numeric values in tables (do not skip tables!)

If datasheet has a "Technical Data" / "Specifications" / "Specifications tabulaire" / "Technische Daten" section тАФ extract EVERY row.

Do NOT skip specs because they seem obvious. Extract literally.

If a value is truly absent, omit the key. Do NOT write "N/A" or "not specified".

Return empty specs {} ONLY if the PDF genuinely has no technical specifications (rare for datasheets).
pdf_text:
HP LaserJet Pro 400 Printer M401 series
Without touchscreen: M401a, M401d, M401dne
Feature-packed and easy to use, this fast and reliable HP LaserJet
helps you meet all your professional printing needs тАУ including
printing from mobile devices plus optional touchscreen access to
business apps тАУ while reducing environmental impact.
Without touchscreen: M401a, M401d, M401dne
(with optional 500-sheet tray)
With touchscreen: M401dn, M401dw
Touchscreen on M401dn, M401dw
1 Available on M401dw model only. 2 Wireless performance is dependent upon physical environment and distance from access point, and may be limited during active VPN connections. 3 Available on M401dn, M401dw and M401dne models only. 4 Available on M401dn and
M401dw models only. 5 Requires a wireless access point and an Internet connection to the printer. Services may require registration. Availability varies by country, language, and agreements, and requires a firmware upgrade. For details, www.hp.com/go/eprintcenter. 6 HP Auto
Wireless Connect may not be available for all system configurations. Wireless performance is dependent upon physical environment and distance from access point. For information on compatibility, visit www.hp.com/go/autowirelessconnect. 7 Requires an Internet connection
to the printer. Feature works with any connected Internet- and email-capable device. Requires HP Web Services Account Registration. Print times may vary. For a list of supported documents, and image types, see www.hp.com/go/eprintcenter. And for additional solutions, see
www.hp.com/go/mobile-printing-solutions. 8 Supports iOS 4.2 devices (iPad, iPhone 4, iPhone 3GS, and 3rd and 4th generation iPod touch) that support multitasking. iOS 4.2 devices require an 802.11 wireless network connection, AirPrint-capable printer can be connected
wireless or via Ethernet. AirPrint and the AirPrint Logo are trademarks of Apple Inc. iPad, iPhone, and iPod touch are trademarks of Apple Inc., registered in the U.S. and other countries. 9 Not available on all mobile devices. Must be wireless-enabled and may require driver or
apps, available for download at www.hp.com/go/eprintcenter. Printer must be HP ePrint-enabled. 10 Available on M401d, M401dn, M401dw and M401dne models only. 11 Measured using ISO/IEC 24734, excludes first set of test documents. For more information see
www.hp.com/go/printerclaims. Exact speed varies depending on the system configuration, software application, driver, and document complexity. 12 Smart Install works with Windows┬о only тАУ for USB and network-connections. Not available with M401dne model. 13 HP 80X
LaserJet Black Toner Cartridge not included; must be purchased separately. 14 HP Auto-On/Auto-Off Technology capabilities subject to printer and settings. 15 Programme availability varies. HP cartridge return and recycling is currently available in more than 50 countries and
territories around the world through the HP Planet Partners programme. For more information, or to request return envelopes and bulk collection boxes, visit www.hp.com/recycle
Stay productive and boost business with
wireless networking and impressive
mobility.
тЧПSet up and share anywhere in the office with wireless
connectivity2,3. Configure networking fast1,6.
тЧПPrint from virtually anywhere with HP ePrint3,7. Print
wirelessly from your iPad┬о, iPhone┬о, and iPod touch┬о with
AirPrintтДв8.
тЧПSend files from a mobile device directly to your printer using
HP wireless direct printing1,9.
тЧПSave paper with automatic two-sided printing10. Get fast
print speeds up to 33 ppm A4 and a first page out in less
than 8 seconds11.
Experience web-connected ease of use.
тЧПUse business apps and the 8.89 cm (3.5-inch) colour
touchscreen to access and print from the web4,5.
тЧПInstall your printer fast тАУ there's no CD required with HP
Smart Install12.
тЧПManage workflow with intuitive features right on the printer.
A convenient USB port enables printing directly from a flash
drive4.
тЧПEasily control your print environment and save IT time and
costs тАУ HP Web Jetadmin helps you monitor equipment and
increase uptime.
Enjoy professional-quality output for a
great value.
тЧПProduce professional-quality business documents with bold,
crisp text and sharp images.
тЧПGet peace of mind with trusted HP LaserJet reliability and
consistent print quality from the first to the last page.
тЧПSave time with easy-to-install Original HP cartridges, and
save money with optional high-capacity cartridges designed
for frequent printing13.
тЧПDo more with a 300-sheet paper capacity (800-sheets total
with optional 500-sheet tray).
Reduce your environmental impact.
тЧПSave energy with HP Auto-On/Auto-Off Technology which
turns your printer on when you need it and off when you
donтАЩt14.
тЧПReduce paper use by up to 50% with automatic two-sided
printing.
тЧПEasily recycle Original HP LaserJet toner cartridges through
HP Planet Partners15.
тЧПReduce packaging waste: Original HP toner cartridge HP 80A
ships in the printer.

Warranty
One-year warranty. Warranty and support options vary by product, country and local legal requirements.
Series at a glance
